0.response: {"Q0":"i used the strategies learnt from the instructions, i tried my best to do as instructed to complete the game."}

9.response: {"Q0":"well the amount of gold to be translated to bonus in real money should have been included in the beginning of the study to make a person mentally prepared to take on or even finish  the study"}

2.response: {"Q0":"to my best intuition, the red and blue gems appeared algorithmically and more frequent than the ice ones which appeared continuously in some of the games."}

8.response: {"Q0":"i was focused throughout the game so i think no, i retained a level focus throughout the study"}

3.response: {"Q0":"yes, mine was red and after the astronaut left, i didnt bother digging that planet anymore, because y doing that i would waste my gold"}

4.response: {"Q0":"yes, as per the instructions in the game"}

11.response: {"Q0":"i felt like the bonus of $2 was slightly lower than my expectations, also loosing the lottery made it more painful"}
